vacation is a period of rest and relaxation for travelers  
* * *  
a trip to a new place for enjoyment and leisure  
a time to explore and enjoy the beauty of the world  

travelers seek to escape their daily routines and enjoy new experiences  
* * *  
people look for ways to relax and enjoy their time  
the goal is to enjoy the journey and the destination  

the purpose of a vacation is to enjoy and relax  
* * *  
to enjoy the experience and the surroundings  
to have a memorable and pleasant time
